title: Greek Salad
description: Fresh and vibrant salad with ripe tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and creamy feta.
steps: Cut tomatoes into wedges and cucumber into thick half-moons.
Thinly slice the red onion into rings.
Arrange tomatoes, cucumber, and onion on a plate. Scatter olives over the top.
Place a generous block of feta cheese in the center.
Drizzle with olive oil and red wine vinegar. Sprinkle with oregano, salt, and pepper.
Serve immediately — do not toss, let people break the feta as they eat.
